Use the template headers. Existing Order IDs will be skipped.
Type a barcode you saved under Products & the title + cost price fill in automatically. Sale price is what the customer paid (VAT included) — the desk removes 5% VAT and splits it per piece for you.

CRM

Customers & platforms

Create selling channels, customers and default warehouse rules.

Customer

7
If selected, this customer's orders deduct stock from that warehouse. Blank keeps the automatic platform rule.
If the platform is not listed, click and add it below.

Platforms

Add channels like Website, Delivery Woo, TikTok, Shopify or any future marketplace.
3
Noon and Amazon report imports stay supported. Other platforms can be entered by historical sales Excel import, manual orders and manual expenses.

Edit order
